tree.text: The most meaningful housework I have done
tree.cn: 我做过的最有意义的家务事

children.text: The most meaningful housework I have done was cooking dinner for my parents.
children.cn: 我做过的最有意义的家务是为我父母做晚饭。
children.notes: meaningful: 有意义的; housework: 家务; cooking dinner: 做晚饭
children.statement: 作者做过的最有意义的家务是洗衣服。
children.explanation: 句子中明确说的是做晚饭（cooking dinner），而不是洗衣服（washing clothes）。

children.text: Last Sunday, they came back home very late because of work.
children.cn: 上个星期天，因为工作，他们很晚才回家。
children.notes: came back: 回来（come back的过去式）; because of: 因为，由于
children.statement: “because of” 后面接的是名词或名词短语，而 “because” 后面接句子。
children.explanation: because of 是介词短语，后接名词、代词或动名词；because 是连词，后接原因状语从句。
children.keywords: Last Sunday, came back, late, because of

children.text: So I decided to prepare a simple meal for them.
children.cn: 所以我决定为他们准备一顿简单的饭。
children.notes: decided to: 决定做某事（decide to do）; prepare: 准备; simple meal: 简单的饭
children.statement: “decided to” 后面应该接动词的过去式形式。
children.explanation: decide to 后必须接动词原形（此处为 prepare），以构成动词不定式。

children.text: This experience taught me that cooking is an important life skill.
children.cn: 这次经历教会了我，烹饪是一项重要的生活技能。
children.notes: experience: 经历; taught: 教（teach的过去式）; life skill: 生活技能
children.statement: “taught” 是动词 “teach” 的过去式形式。
children.explanation: teach 的过去式是不规则变化，为 taught，意为“教，教授”。

children.text: Also, I understand how hard my parents work every day, and I can share their duties.
children.cn: 同时，我理解了我父母每天工作有多辛苦，而且我可以分担他们的职责。
children.notes: understand: 理解，明白; share: 分享，分担; duties: 职责（duty的复数）
children.explanation: “duties” 是以辅音字母 + y 结尾的名词 duty 的复数形式（把 y 变为 i 再加 -es）。

children.text: Finally, I realized that keeping our home clean and warm is everyone's responsibility.
children.cn: 最后，我意识到保持我们的家干净和温暖是每个人的责任。
children.notes: realized: 意识到; keeping: 保持（动名词作主语）; responsibility: 责任
children.statement: “responsibility” 的词性是名词，表示“责任”。
children.explanation: responsibility 是名词，意为“责任”，在句中作主语的表语部分。

tree.text: The most meaningful housework I have done
tree.cn: 我做过的最有意义的家务事

children.text: Among all the chores I have done, the most meaningful one was cooking a delicious dinner for my parents.
children.cn: 在我做过的所有家务中，最有意义的一件是为我的父母做一顿美味的晚餐。
children.notes: Among: 在……之中; chores: 家务活（chore的复数）; meaningful: 有意义的; delicious: 美味的
children.statement: “chores” 意为“日常零星家务活”，是可数名词复数形式。
children.explanation: chore 是可数名词，意为“家庭杂务，日常零碎工作”，复数直接加 -s 变为 chores。

children.text: Last Sunday, seeing that they were extremely tired after a long day of work, I decided to prepare a meal to surprise them.
children.cn: 上个星期天，看到他们在漫长的一天工作后极其疲惫，我决定准备一顿饭给他们一个惊喜。
children.notes: seeing that: 看到……（现在分词短语作状语）; extremely tired: 极其疲惫; prepare a meal: 准备一顿饭; surprise: 使惊喜
children.statement: 句首的 “seeing that...” 是动名词短语作主语。
children.explanation: “seeing that...” 在句中是现在分词短语作状语（可表示伴随或原因），而不是动名词作主语。
children.keywords: seeing, extremely tired, decided, prepare, surprise

children.text: Firstly, this hands-on experience made me realize that cooking is a crucial life skill which we all should master.
children.cn: 首先，这次亲身实践的经历让我意识到烹饪是一项我们都应该掌握的关键生活技能。
children.notes: hands-on experience: 亲身体验/亲身实践的经历; crucial: 至关重要的，关键的; master: 掌握，精通
children.statement: “crucial” 在这里相当于 “important”，但语气更强，表示“至关重要的”。
children.explanation: crucial 意为“关键的，至关重要的”，程度比普通的 important 深很多。
children.keywords: Firstly, hands-on experience, crucial life skill, master

children.text: Secondly, it helped me understand how hard my parents work to support our family, which encourages me to share more family duties.
children.cn: 其次，它帮助我理解了我的父母为了支持家庭是多么辛苦地工作，这鼓励我分担更多的家庭职责。
children.notes: support our family: 养家糊口/支持家庭; encourages: 鼓励; share family duties: 分担家庭职责
children.statement: 句中的 “which” 引导定语从句，修饰前面整个主句所表达的内容。
children.explanation: which 在这里引导非限制性定语从句，指代前面“理解父母辛苦工作”这一整件事，并作为从句的主语。
children.keywords: Secondly, support family, encourages, share, duties

children.text: Most importantly, I learned that keeping our home comfortable is not only my parents' job but also my responsibility.
children.cn: 最重要的是，我学到了保持家里的舒适不仅是我父母的工作，也是我的责任。
children.notes: comfortable: 舒适的; not only... but also...: 不仅……而且……; responsibility: 责任
children.statement: “not only... but also...” 在这里连接了两个并列的表语部分。
children.explanation: not only... but also... 连接了名词短语 my parents' job 和 my responsibility，作为 is 的并列表语部分。
children.keywords: Most importantly, comfortable, not only, but also, responsibility
children.highlight: Most importantly, that, not only ... but also
